title: T3 Ingestion: Second ingestion wave — orchestration cluster ×3 (Session 1: harvest + draft)
prompt: Run the factory's second canonical-ingestion wave using the pipeline proven on review-dimensional (T3-01/T3-02): ingest the orchestration cluster's three locked gap-closers — swarm-topology, autonomous-pipeline-runner, governance-and-observability (the cluster index's own Top-3; the other 6 distilled sub-clusters are explicitly NOT in this wave). For each: harvest the 3 verbatim origins named in the war game into canonical/skills/<name>/_source/ (winners: ruflo agent-hierarchical-coordinator, superpowers subagent-driven-development, ruflo observe; note truth-trail is harvested from appydave-plugins/_archived/ — read-only), write a spec-valid provenance.json with recorded upstream SHAs, and draft SKILL.md in David's voice — stack-agnostic (no ruflo daemon/npx/MCP syntax), trigger-only description, <=400 lines. This is Session 1 ONLY: end every artifact at rewrite_status 'in-style', never 'ratified'; no wave-2 ratify ticket exists, so backlog/wargames/proof/T3-19/REPORT.md must carry a per-artifact Session-2 checklist telling David to clone the wg-t3-02 pattern. If governance-and-observability won't cohere from its thin sources, ship the wave as 2 artifacts per Fork F3 — that is success, not failure. Finish with in-style rows appended to canonical/INDEX.md (increment counts, never reset), the report, and a pushed commit. Read and execute the war game at backlog/wargames/T3-19-ingest-orchestration-wave.md. Follow its moves in order; on any failure signal apply the counter-move; on any abort condition stop and write needs-decision/.
verify: In ~/dev/ad/apps/dark-factory: canonical/skills/swarm-topology/ and canonical/skills/autonomous-pipeline-runner/ (and canonical/skills/governance-and-observability/ unless the report documents an F3 deferral) each contain SKILL.md, provenance.json, and _source/ with the war game's named verbatim copies, winners byte-identical to upstream (diff empty). Each provenance.json parses, has exactly 3 origins each with non-empty kept[] and a source_commit, and rewrite_status exactly 'in-style' — never 'ratified'. Each SKILL.md has name/description/argument-hint/allowed-tools frontmatter, name matching its folder, body <=400 lines with zero ruflo/npx/daemon/MCP stack terms. canonical/INDEX.md has an in-style row per shipped artifact with counts incremented, not reset. backlog/wargames/proof/T3-19/REPORT.md exists with per-artifact Session-2 checklists plus the mandatory findings (truth-trail archived; zero orchestration evaluations; distillations INDEX 8-vs-9 discrepancy). A pushed commit mentioning wg-t3-19 exists. Negative: git status clean in ~/dev/ad/appydave-plugins, all four upstream repos, research/, docs/, and canonical/skills/review-dimensional/ — none touched.
